word: G4364 - προσποιέομαι - prospoiéomai - pros-poy-eh'-om-ahee - Make as though

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Make as though
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to take or claim (a thing) to oneself
2. to conform oneself to a thing
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G4314 and G4160; to do forward for oneself, that is, pretend (as if about to do a thing): - make as though.
